textByHash.fd11f3161d963124dde0244c36ccb55fc11f7f60: The Grail? That is truly a noble quest indeed. None but Galahad have come close.
textByHash.725a037af17857fec1861ddc61193dfd7d38e7d7: He used to be one of the Knights of the Round Table, but he mysteriously disappeared many years ago.
textByHash.071cd653f7856d0a62c14d6e81e8238aa6c405e0: I'm afraid I don't have the answer.
textByHash.1e685c3ffdd758a39f974c0681a7d3e48842b3d9: I think you've done the main quest we were on right now...
textByHash.9d11555790ba7fcba8229e5965cf8eeb6a3716b0: Isn't it terrible what happened to King Arthur? He was turned to stone before my eyes! I have failed him, I am not worthy of being his knight. To allow such lowlifes to take Camelot right from under our noses... It's unforgivable.
textByHash.60f80298878d663f481282de0fe0d394d089cf37: Well, I would have thought picking the lock was really the best way, but I don't have the knowledge or tools to do it.
textByHash.783d45b84f5b5f26b9e6317f06189f72cc257a60: How are you going to get all of us out of here?
textByHash.e94a6e34c078f69eabadfa6843a5ba3849927940: No, my revenge will be my own. You must retrieve the Holy Grail!
textByHash.2f46a5a7e01ac79fb011324efb7889f211c658f0: Sad is the day when the Round Table Knights fail their King.
textByHash.fabd5495bacf4a09ddef2a4d854bb06b30a0b664: I'm a little stumped myself. We've tried opening it with anything and everything!
textByHash.215edee40740109607f48b5bfbea9ffe58cc711b: I would guess this is the work of the evil Morgan Le Faye!
textByHash.fb3b2be6cf91ff35fbf846ea0e7adef8b50181fe: She lives in her stronghold to the south of here, guarded by some renegade knights led by Sir Mordred.
textByHash.9b23c6e2f4f03152d000ad7dfabe1ec801182a9b: No, you've got me stumped there...
textByHash.9aa5576ca09b6632780a9fa0a8396a65d7c1538e: It is the least I can do.
textByHash.c651b2f5c887671e84eaf9b5746c25c17927c5e4: The king is the man to talk to if you want a quest.
